reason: R18-R28 built the four-arc framework + 7 emergent behaviors. R26-R28 showed every structural change since R25 has been about the measurement substrate itself — composition code untouched, HCI stable at 97-98, listening verdict legendary throughout. Further arc additions are diminishing-returns substrate-navel-gazing until composition changes create real signal. Freeze: no new voters, no new patterns, no new invariants for the next 5 pipeline runs. ONLY bug fixes and retirements of existing measurements. The framework is complete; further investment earns nothing until the composition itself gives the arcs something to measure.
allowed: bug fixes in existing arc code
forbidden: extending Arc III's snapshot state fields
thaw_condition: run_count >= frozen_run_count + thaw_after_runs OR listening verdict changes to non-legendary OR HCI drops below 95 for 2+ consecutive rounds
